info.title: JepangKu Core API
info.description:
Global identity, JWT claims, and gamification engine for the JepangKu ecosystem.

**Consumers:** LMS (`jepangku-lms`) and Portal Berita.

### Authentication

| Flow | Header | Used for |
|------|--------|----------|
| Clerk session | `Authorization: Bearer <clerk_session>` | `POST /auth/token` |
| Core JWT | `Authorization: Bearer <core_jwt>` | `GET /users/me` |
| Service token | `Authorization: Bearer <CORE_SERVICE_TOKEN>` | `POST /gamification/award` |
| Svix webhook | `svix-id`, `svix-timestamp`, `svix-signature` | `POST /auth/webhooks/clerk` |

### Idempotency (award XP)

Send a stable `idempotencyKey` per business event. Duplicate keys return **200** with `idempotent: true` and the original log — no double XP.

See [docs/API.md](https://github.com/webekspres/jepangku-core/blob/main/docs/API.md) for integration examples.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Clerk sync webhook and Core JWT issuance

coreJwt.description: JepangKu Core JWT from POST /api/v1/auth/token. Contains jepangku.* gamification claims.

clerkSession.description: Clerk session token from the client SSO login.

serviceToken.description: Shared secret CORE_SERVICE_TOKEN for server-to-server award XP calls.

get.description: Used by Docker healthcheck. Prefer this over /api/v1/health for probes.
Docker healthcheck should use GET /health at root.

post.description: Clerk sends `user.created`, `user.updated`, and `user.deleted` events. Verify Svix headers (`svix-id`, `svix-timestamp`, `svix-signature`).

post.summary: Issue Core JWT from Clerk session
post.description: Exchange a Clerk session token for a JepangKu JWT with gamification claims (`jepangku.totalXp`, `jepangku.roles`, etc.).

idempotent.description: true when idempotency_key was already processed
true when idempotency_key was already processed
true when idempotency_key was already processed

post.description: Server-to-server endpoint for LMS and Portal Berita. Requires CORE_SERVICE_TOKEN. Idempotent replays return 200 with idempotent=true.

sourceRefId.description: Client-side reference, e.g. quiz attempt ID
Client-side reference, e.g. quiz attempt ID
Client-side reference, e.g. quiz attempt ID

get.summary: Badges unlocked by user (no auth required)
